description.value: Aura strong evocation; CL 12th; Weight 4 lbs.; Price 20,715 gp DESCRIPTION This is a +1 flaming burst longsword. Once per day, the sword can blast forth a fiery ray at any target within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. The ray deals 4d6 points of fire damage on a successful hit. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells scorching ray and fireball, flame blade, or flame strike; Cost 10,515 gp
